intentSynonyms: create a dns record in netlify
add a dns record in netlify
make a new dns record in netlify
open a new dns record in netlify
description: Create a new DNS record in a Netlify DNS zone. Supports A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, and other record types. Specify hostname, type, value, and optionally TTL and priority.

zone_id.description: The DNS zone ID to create the record in

hostname.description: Fully qualified hostname for the record

type.description: Record type (e.g. A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS)

value.description: Record value (IP address, hostname, or text content)

priority.description: Record priority (required for MX and SRV records)
